growth_records.snippet: Overnight cultures of denoted strains were diluted 1:1,000 in fresh LB broth in tubes. Cultures were grown at 37 °C in a rotating roller...The lpxA* mutant had a drastic increase in doubling time (38 min) compared to its
growth_records.notes: Doubling time of 22 min (0.367 h) explicitly reported for WT LAC-4 in LB broth, 37°C, rotating roller (aerobic). growth_rate_per_h = ln2/doubling_time_h = 0.6931/0.367 = 1.89 /h.

growth_records.cite: Hernandez-Bird et al. Resistance, heteroresistance, and fitness costs drive colistin treatment failure during Acinetobacter baumannii pneumonia. Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America (2025). DOI:10.1073/pnas.2515303123. [PMC12773716]
growth_records.snippet: The lpxA* mutant had a drastic increase in doubling time (38 min) compared to its WT parent (22 min) (compare Figs. 2A and 3C).
growth_records.notes: Doubling time of 38 min (0.633 h) explicitly reported for LAC-4 lpxA* LOS-deficient mutant, LB broth, 37°C. growth_rate_per_h = ln2/0.633 = 1.09 /h.

growth_records.strain: LAC-4 LOS-deficient suppressor mutants (3 isolates, improved-growth revertants of LOS(-) strain)
growth_records.cite: Hernandez-Bird et al. Resistance, heteroresistance, and fitness costs drive colistin treatment failure during Acinetobacter baumannii pneumonia. Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America (2025). DOI:10.1073/pnas.2515303123. [PMC12773716]
growth_records.snippet: All three LOS deficient suppressor mutants exhibited significant improvements in doubling time (32 to 35 min; Fig. 3C). Therefore LAC-4 tolerates LOS deficiency...
growth_records.notes: Doubling time range 32-35 min (0.533-0.583 h) reported for 3 suppressor mutants selected from the LOS(-) lpxA* strain (isolated on LB at 42C, doubling time improved vs lpxA* parent). Midpoint 33.5 min used for growth_rate_per_h = ln2/0.5583 = 1.24 /h (range across the 3 isolates: 1.19-1.30 /h).

growth_records.cite: Zhu Y et al. Metabolic Responses to Polymyxin Treatment in Acinetobacter baumannii ATCC 19606: Integrating Transcriptomics and Metabolomics with Genome-Scale Metabolic Modeling. mSystems (2019). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.00157-18. [PMC6365644]
growth_records.snippet: The predicted specific growth rates in MH and LB media were higher than those (0.80 and 0.49 h-1 for growth in MH and LB, respectively) estimated from early-log (2- to 6-h) growth kinetics (31, 32)
growth_records.notes: EXPERIMENTAL growth rate 0.80 h-1 in MH medium, cited FROM prior work (refs 31 = Tran TB et al. 2018, Front Microbiol; 32 = Dorsey CW/Tomaras/Actis 2002, Appl Environ Microbiol), estimated from early-log 2-6 h growth kinetics. doubling_time = ln2/mu = 0.6931/0.80 = 0.866 h. This is the MEASURED value, contrasted in-paper against the model-PREDICTED FBA rate of 2.17 h-1 (not recorded as experimental). No experimental uptake/secretion rates given; all Table 2 fluxes (O2 uptake -45.3, CO2 emission 48.1, biomass 0.82 h-1 control / 0.57 h-1 under 2 mg/L colistin) are E-Flux constraint-based MODEL predictions, not measurements. Biolog assay (64/190 carbon sources utilized) is qualitative growth/no-growth only. MH composition not stated in text.

growth_records.cite: Zhu Y et al. Metabolic Responses to Polymyxin Treatment in Acinetobacter baumannii ATCC 19606: Integrating Transcriptomics and Metabolomics with Genome-Scale Metabolic Modeling. mSystems (2019). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.00157-18. [PMC6365644]
growth_records.snippet: The predicted specific growth rates in MH and LB media were higher than those (0.80 and 0.49 h-1 for growth in MH and LB, respectively) estimated from early-log (2- to 6-h) growth kinetics (31, 32)
growth_records.notes: EXPERIMENTAL growth rate 0.49 h-1 in LB medium, cited FROM prior work (refs 31 = Tran TB et al. 2018, Front Microbiol; 32 = Dorsey CW/Tomaras/Actis 2002, Appl Environ Microbiol), estimated from early-log 2-6 h growth kinetics. doubling_time = ln2/mu = 0.6931/0.49 = 1.414 h. Contrasted in-paper against model-PREDICTED FBA rate of 1.40 h-1 (not recorded as experimental). No experimental uptake/secretion rates reported; Table 2 fluxes are E-Flux MODEL outputs. LB composition not stated in text.
